section_name: Requests for Information by Mail or Electronic Means
text:
(a) The department by rule may provide that the holder of a driver’s license issued by the department may submit a request for information under Sections 521.045-521.048 by mail, by telephone, over the Internet, or by other electronic means.

(b) A rule adopted under Subsection (a):

(1) may prescribe eligibility standards for release of the requested information; and

(2) may not conflict with any provision of this chapter or another law that relates to the release of the information by the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.0485 — Requests for Information by Mail or Electronic Means

(a) The department by rule may provide that the holder of a driver’s license issued by the department may submit a request for information under Sections 521.045-521.048 by mail, by telephone, over the Internet, or by other electronic means.

(b) A rule adopted under Subsection (a):

    (1) may prescribe eligibility standards for release of the requested information; and

    (2) may not conflict with any provision of this chapter or another law that relates to the release of the information by the department.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 866, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*
